calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Instructing Trustee Re: Final Distribution Of Trust Estate And Disclosure Of Trust Documentation
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee Re: Final Distribution Of Trust Estate And Disclosure Of Trust Documentation
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for (successor trustee) Kurt Posey. Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan.

Ms. Rodman stated that all land was transferred to Mr. McCauley's client and the other beneficiary, the residence was transferred to the successor trustee, that all stocks and cash were distributed except for a minimal amount, tax returns for 2014 will be prepared, an accounting to the beneficiaries is being prepared and that they will do a diminimus distribution when done. Mr. McCauley had nothing to add. The petition to instruct trustee, etc., was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for Kurt Posey. Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan.

Ms. Rodman stated that the remaining issues are the tax returns, fees and the reserve amount. The Petition to Instruct Trustee, etc. was continued to July 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Apr-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for Kurt Posey (Trustee). Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan (Respondent).

Mr. McCauley stated that he thinks they are in good shape, that the Trustee is proceeding to make distribution and that the feeling is that they are in the final stages. Ms. Rodman suggested a six week continuance. The Petition to Instruct Trustee, etc. was continued to April 9, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Joan Rodman for Kurt Posey (Trustee). Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan (Respondent).

Ms. Rodman reported that the parties are close to resolution, that they are having an appraisal done, that the Trustee will get the house which is worth more than 1/3 of the estate and the other two heirs (Cheryl and Tom) will get everything else. Mr. McCauley stated that they are working on a reserve for Trustee's fees and personal property issue. The Petition to Instruct Trustee was continued to February 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the matter is settled before the next hearing, matter can go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for Kurt Posey. Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan (Respondent).

Counsel reported that they made progress, that they are in the process of selecting an Appraiser, that the significant amount is the current appraisal on the property, and that the hope is to proceed forward once they get the appraisal done and distribute the Trust. The Petition for Instructions was continued to January 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Nov-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for Kurt Posey. Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan.

Counsel reported that they have made some progress, that some items have been received and that some have not, that they need to get an appraisal, that the Trustee has prepared an accounting and that the accounting needs to be provided. The Court stated that it would be helpful for the Parties to obtain a professional Appraiser, that it is not appropriate for the Trustee to be hiring an appraiser and contractors, and that it would be appropriate for the Parties to agree on an Appraiser. Ms. Rodman stated that the Successor Trustee has no plans at all to use any Trust funds to spruce up the house. The Petition for Instructions was continued to November 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on setting of the petition. The Court encouraged the Parties to put as much information on the table.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee: Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for Kurt Posey (Petitioner). Brian McCauley for Cheryl Donovan.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether the Beneficiary should have access to the online bank statements, whether the Trustee should be required to turn over the online banking password and provide access to the online bank account, and the period of time for which Mr. Posey is required to provide information. The Court stated that any documents during the time the Mother was alive are not relevant and asked Mr. McCauley to narrow down his request. The Petition to Instruct Trustee, etc. was continued to September 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)
